'''Gilfrome''' was the [[Guild Master/Legends|guildmaster]] for the [[Barlok/Legends|Barlok]] mining company and an opponent of the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] plant to usurp control of the mines. He was nearly assassinated along with Corporate Alliance leader [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]] while negotiating over the dispute. He was saved by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Jorus C'baoth]], who had been [[Mission to Barlok|sent]] to the planet to mediate the discussions.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
